chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 5827 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No. 24434/25. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.01.2026 Mr. Arshad Hussain Shahzad, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Anas Makhdoom, Advocate. Mr. Anas Habib, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Javed Ali Sangi, Advocate for Respondent. Ghulam Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Kalash A. Vaswani, AAG. ---------- Comments have been submitted in the matter on behalf of Respondents No. 3 & 4, which are taken on record. Learned counsel are ad-idem that the controversy underpinning this matter is covered by the Order made by a learned Division Bench of this Court on 21.01.2025 in C.P No. D- 2689/2017 and connected cases. They seek the disposal of the matter accordingly. So ordered. The petition accordingly stands disposed of in light of the aforementioned Order, which shall apply mutatis mutandis to the matter at hand. Judge Judge Ayaz
